background_concepts.concept: Mobile money agent networks (cash-in/cash-out, e-float, liquidity management)
background_concepts.why_needed: The Tanzania study treats mobile-money agents as its unit of analysis, assuming the reader knows what an agent is, how they convert physical cash to electronic value (cash-in/cash-out), and why liquidity/float management is central to their role as intermediaries — none of which the paper explains.

suggested_resources.title: Building, Incentivising and Managing a Network of Mobile Money Agents (GSMA handbook)

background_concepts.concept: KYC / AML-CFT regulation in financial services
background_concepts.why_needed: Agents' role in customer registration and the regulatory constraints they operate under presuppose familiarity with Know-Your-Customer and anti-money-laundering rules, which shape what agents may legally do but are referenced without explanation.

suggested_resources.title: The pivotal role of mobile money agents in driving financial inclusion (GSMA)

domain_name: Satellite Imagery and Remote Sensing for Poverty and Socioeconomic Measurement

background_concepts.concept: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for image feature extraction
background_concepts.why_needed: The paper predicts socioeconomic indicators from satellite imagery and assumes the reader understands how CNNs extract visual features (convolution, pooling, feature maps) from images without teaching the architecture.

suggested_resources.title: Satellite Image Classification with Deep Learning / CNN structure (arXiv primer by Mark Pritt)
Land Cover Classification of Satellite Imagery using CNNs (hands-on tutorial)

background_concepts.concept: Transfer learning / fine-tuning of pre-trained models
background_concepts.why_needed: Predicting poverty from imagery where labeled ground-truth is sparse typically relies on transfer learning from pre-trained networks (e.g., ImageNet); the method is assumed rather than introduced.

suggested_resources.title: A Gentle Introduction to Transfer Learning for Deep Learning
Transfer Learning for Computer Vision Tutorial (PyTorch official)

domain_name: Data & Analytics for Aid and SDG Tracking

background_concepts.concept: Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI) and non-monetary deprivation measures
background_concepts.why_needed: The COVID-19 vulnerability analysis characterizes 'poor and vulnerable groups' through multiple overlapping deprivations (health, education, living standards) in a way that assumes familiarity with multidimensional poverty measurement rather than income-only poverty lines.

suggested_resources.title: Beyond income: understanding poverty through the Multidimensional Poverty Index (Our World in Data)
What makes one poor – understanding the Multidimensional Poverty Index (UNDP India)
